Quote Number Counter

Setup steps:
1. Open CBS_master_catalog_v11 in Google Sheets
2. Add a new tab named Config
3. Put 3160 in cell A1
4. Extensions → Apps Script
5. Paste the script from CBS_apps_script.js
6. Deploy → New deployment → Web app
7. Execute as: Me · Access: Anyone
8. Copy the URL and paste above
Publishing Steps
1. Open CBS_master_catalog_v10 in Google Drive
2. File → Share → Publish to web
3. Choose CSV, select the sheet tab
4. Click Publish → copy the link
5. Paste above and hit Reload
URL is saved in your browser. Reload anytime after updating the sheet — no need to re-download this file.
Cost Patches0 patches
Costs you enter inline are saved locally and applied to every quote session.
